title: Print Frosted Cup with Colour Lid & Straw (700ml) - Assorted Colours & Stylish Drinkware - Perfect for Parties & Outdoors - 1 Pc
features: STYLISH & INSPIRATIONAL: Add a splash of colour and positivity to your beverages with our print frosted cup (700ml) featuring 4 assorted shades - green, grey, orange, and red, each adorned with an inspiring quote to keep you motivated throughout your day.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Expertly crafted from top-grade materials, our print frosted cup offers exceptional durability and resistance to withstand daily usage, ensuring that you'll be able to enjoy your favourite drinks for a long time to come.

PERFECT PARTY COMPANION & OUTDOOR BUDDY: Whether you're hosting a lively gathering, enjoying a picnic, or simply relaxing by the pool, our versatile print frosted cup is the ideal drinkware choice for serving cold beverages, shakes, smoothies, or even cocktails.

REUSABLE & ECO-FRIENDLY: Say goodbye to single-use plastics and embrace a sustainable lifestyle with our reusable print frosted cup with colour lid & straw, making it perfect for environmentally conscious consumers who still value style and convenience.

IMPRESSIVE GIFT IDEA: Looking for a unique and thoughtful present? Our print frosted cup with colour lid & straw (1 pc) makes for an excellent gift choice for loved ones and friends, showcasing your care for their well-being and the environment.
description: Introducing our print frosted cup with colour lid & straw - a stylish, versatile drinkware item that takes your beverage consumption to the next level. Boasting a generous 700ml capacity, this cup is perfect for staying hydrated throughout the day, at parties, or during outdoor adventures. Crafted in an assortment of vibrant colours, its design adds a pop of personality to your drinkware collection. The cup comes with a colour coordinated lid and straw, enhancing ease of use while minimizing spillage. Whether you're sipping on chilled lemonade or your favourite cocktail, our print frosted cup is sure to elevate the experience. Please note, this package includes 1 pc of the cup.
